name: embridge
description: Create, read, edit, validate, diagnose, and convert Embridge Markdown item lists and task lists.

interface.longDescription: Create, read, edit, validate, diagnose, and convert Embridge Markdown item lists and task lists while preserving IDs, metadata, comments, attachments, and round-trip-safe structure.
defaultPrompt: Use Embridge to create a task list.
Convert this list to Embridge format.
